# Khatir Real Estate & Builders

> Trusted property dealers and builders in Peshawar — verified houses, plots, apartments and commercial properties, plus consultancy and turn-key construction.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Khatir Real Estate & Builders and featured properties.
- [Properties](/work): Verified listings on Kohat Road and AWT Housing Scheme.
- [Services](/services): Consultancy, construction and project development.
- [About](/about): Company background, founded 2005 in Peshawar.
- [Contact](/contact): Office address and phone contacts.
- [Blog](/blog): Insights on architecture, design and urban planning.

## Optional

- [Sustainable Architecture](/blog/sustainable-architecture-future)
- [Minimalism in Modern Living](/blog/minimalism-modern-living)
- [Urban Planning](/blog/urban-planning-community-spaces)
